series_metadata.series_description: Credit Card payments to Pesticide and Fertilizer Regulation. All documents relating to credit card payments such as but not limited to applications, licenses, tonnage, certificates, registrations, enforcedment penalties, etc. Credit card numbers must be redacted on all credit card documents either by programming or mechanically.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 3 years ; Paper: Verify and destroy immediately, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
